name: loadout
description: Per-project plus per-task plugin loadouts. Layers a sticky tech baseline (android/rust/web-ext/...) with on-demand task overlays (security-audit/release/wiki/...) and writes the resulting `enabledPlugins` map to .claude/settings.local.json so only the plugins relevant to the current work load at session start. Detects the tech baseline automatically from Cargo.toml / build.gradle / manifest.json on first entry; task overlays toggle via /loadout +name and /loadout -name.
